title: AeroGrapple
description: A clean, modern, and lightweight grappling hook plugin that feels great to use.
body:
# рҹҺЈ AeroGrapple ### *A clean, modern, and lightweight grappling hook plugin* ![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.17--1.21.4+-brightgreen?style=for-the-badge) ![Platform](https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-Spigot%20%7C%20Paper-orange?style=for-the-badge) ![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-blue?style=for-the-badge) Swing across gaps, scale cliffs, reel in mobs, nudge players, or snag items with sensible defaults and fineвҖ‘grained permissions so you stay in control. --- **Heavily modified fork of the original [GrapplingHook](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/grappling-hook.22854/) by SnowGears [65000+ Downloads]**
--- ## вңЁ Highlights - рҹӘқ **Smooth, intuitive movement** using a fishing hook as the grapple - рҹҺҜ **Multiple hook types** with unique abilities - slow falling, sticky landing, fall damage prevention - вҡЎ **Customizable physics** - adjust throwing and pulling speeds independently - рҹ”§ **Hook repair system** with optional Vault economy costs - рҹ”” **Auto-update checker** - get notified of new versions in-game - вҸұпёҸ **Optional use-limit per hook** with configurable destroy/repair behavior - рҹ‘‘ **Admin-friendly commands** and instant reload support - рҹ’¬ **Fully customizable messages** - disable any by setting to "" - рҹҡҖ **Lightweight and optimized** - performance focused --- ## вҢЁпёҸ Commands > All commands support: `/aerograpple`, `/grapplinghook`, or `/gh` | Command | Description | |---------|-------------| | `/aerograpple reload` | Reload plugin configuration | | `/aerograpple give [player]` | Give a grappling hook | | `/aerograpple repair [player]` | Repair held grappling hook | | `/aerograpple repairall [player]` | Repair all hooks in inventory | **Required Permissions:** `aerograpple.operator`, `aerograpple.repair`, `aerograpple.repairall`, `aerograpple.repairothers` --- ## вҡҷпёҸ Hook Configuration Each hook in `hooks.yml` is fully customizable:
рҹ“Ӣ Settings - `max_uses` - Uses before breaking (-1 = unlimited) - `cooldown_seconds` - Delay between uses - `repair_cost` - Vault cost to repair (requires Vault plugin) - `throwing_speed` / `pulling_speed` - Physics customization (x/y/z multipliers)
вңЁ Special Features - `prevent_fall_damage` - No fall damage when using this hook - `slow_falling` - Fall slowly while hook is active above you - `sticky_landing` - Hook sticks to surfaces longer
рҹҺЁ Filters & Appearance **Filters:** - `allowed_blocks` - Control which blocks hook attaches to (ALLOW_ONLY / BLOCK_ONLY) - `allowed_entities` - Control which entities can be hooked **Appearance:** - Custom names with color codes - Lore with `[uses]` placeholder - Texture IDs for resource packs
--- ## рҹ”җ Permissions
Basic Permissions - `aerograpple.pull.self` - Pull yourself to locations - `aerograpple.pull.mobs` - Pull mobs - `aerograpple.pull.players` - Pull players - `aerograpple.pull.items` - Pull items
Special Permissions - `aerograpple.player.nopull` - Cannot be pulled by others - `aerograpple.player.nocooldown` - Bypass cooldowns
Admin Permissions - `aerograpple.operator` - Use commands - `aerograpple.repair` - Repair own hooks - `aerograpple.repairall` - Repair all own hooks - `aerograpple.repairothers` - Repair other players' hooks
--- ## рҹ“Ҙ Installation 1. рҹ“Ұ Download the latest version from the **Versions** tab 2. рҹ“Ӯ Drop the jar into your server's `plugins/` folder 3. рҹ’° *(Optional)* Install [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/) for economy repair costs 4. рҹ”„ Start/restart your server to generate configuration files 5. рҹ”‘ Grant permissions to groups/players as needed 6. вңҸпёҸ Customize hooks and messages in `hooks.yml` and `config.yml` 7. вҡЎ Use `/aerograpple reload` to apply changes without restart --- ## рҹ”§ Compatibility | Feature | Details | |---------|---------| | **API Version** | 1.17+ | | **Minecraft Versions** | 1.17 - 1.21.4+ | | **Platforms** | Spigot, Paper, Purpur | | **Soft Dependencies** | Vault *(optional, for economy)* | --- ## рҹ”— Links & Support - рҹ“ҳ **[GitHub Repository](https://github.com/m-suro/AeroGrapple)** - рҹҗӣ **[Report Issues](https://github.com/m-suro/AeroGrapple/issues)** - рҹ’¬ **[Spigot Page](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/grappling-hook.22854/)** *(Original)* ---
### Give your players a movement tool that's fun, fair, and feels great to use. рҹҺЈ *Made with вқӨпёҸ by [m-suro](https://github.com/m-suro)*
